                        "ID": "checkPoint",
                        "Name": "Check Point",
                        "Description": "This checkpoint attribute will be used by the Cancel Order Process to pick up the correct row in the DMN for triggering what to rollback. This char value will not be supplied during order creation, it will be set by the process during run time.",
